children.name: E-Commerce Ecosystem
children.description: Enterprise storefront systems, dynamic shopping checkouts, payment processing portals, and inventory services.

children.name: Checkout & Payments System
children.description: Interactive visual map of customer checkouts, Stripe external gateways, and S3 manifest state registers.

children.name: Inventory & Warehouse Services
children.description: Active tracking systems, warehouse database registers, stock catalogs, and supplier logistics feeds.

children.name: Telecom Backbone Infrastructure
children.description: High-availability fiber backbones, cellular access gateway nodes, routing rings, and regional switching grids.
